attributes.title: Domestic Violence (DV)
attributes.body:
### Domestic Violence (DV) User Manuals

- [InfoNet Manual for DV](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/Info_Net_Manual_for_DV_87e639d5ba.pdf)

### Definitions

- [Revised 2024 DV InfoNet Definitions](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/Info_Net_Definitions_Revisions_Oct_2024_b6e22e853a.docx)

### Trainings

- **Domestic Violence Reports Training (September 16, 2025)**
    - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL4n4n7ZvbgEMiudeOHONV0PLYZrfoLJbC

- **Domestic Violence Data Entry Training (December 4, 2024)**
    - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL4n4n7ZvbgEOeLZG5ctBIWGkxOR2eDQij

- **Using InfoNet’s Household Feature to Link Clients in the Same Household (February 1, 2024)**
    - https://youtu.be/xlOEAQ-5Gwc
    
- **Generating and Troubleshooting InfoNet HUD Reports (January 23, 2024)**
    - https://youtu.be/rHI7dVkQ2KE
    
- **Using InfoNet’s New Client Needs & Updates Features (January 09, 2024)**
    - https://youtu.be/6nT_ry4CpNM




### Data Collection/Entry Forms

- [DVAdult_RESIDENTIAL_7-2020.pdf](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Adult_RESIDENTIAL_7_2020_d7e3b8c33b.pdf)
- [DVAdult_NONResidential_7-2020.pdf](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Adult_NON_Residential_7_2020_8c3b8b2951.pdf)
- [DVChild_NONResidential_7-2020.pdf](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Child_NON_Residential_7_2020_2bd8c5ea0a.pdf)
- [DVChild_RESIDENTIAL_7-2020.pdf](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Child_RESIDENTIAL_7_2020_761cf05d9c.pdf)
- [DVAdult_RESIDENTIAL_7-2020.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Adult_RESIDENTIAL_7_2020_788548f82a.docx)
- [DVChild_RESIDENTIAL_7-2020.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Child_RESIDENTIAL_7_2020_6ef26e61eb.docx)
- [DVAdult_NONResidential_7-2020.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Adult_NON_Residential_7_2020_0d3870bf83.docx)
- [DVChild_NONResidential_7-2020.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Child_NON_Residential_7_2020_23499ed73d.docx)
- [DV InfoNet Shelter Departure Information Form.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Info_Net_Shelter_Departure_Information_Form_b58ccae120.docx)
- [DV Infonet Monthly Turn Away Data Collection Form.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Infonet_Monthly_Turn_Away_Data_Collection_Form_9cb3d8b910.docx)
- [DV Service Outcome Data Collection Form.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Service_Outcome_Data_Collection_Form_d62b6b5494.docx)
- [DV Infonet Hotline Call Log Sheet sample.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Infonet_Hotline_Call_Log_Sheet_sample_aebbd6ad84.docx)
- [DV Infonet Group Services Log_07-19.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Infonet_Group_Services_Log_07_19_448a688ccd.docx)
- [DV Infonet Child Service Log 7-19.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Infonet_Child_Service_Log_7_19_7f3d6e5922.docx)
- [DV Infonet Community Service Log Form 8-15.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Infonet_Community_Service_Log_Form_8_15_e45eeef0b2.docx)
- [DV Infonet Adult Service log 11-2022.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_Infonet_Adult_Service_log_11_2022_c635533f58.docx)
- [DV CLIENT NEEDS 2024.docx](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/DV_CLIENT_NEEDS_2024_221486cafa.docx)

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

- [Download Domestic Violence (DV) FAQs (Word)](https://infonet.icjia-api.cloud/uploads/3_3_1_DV_INFONET_Frequently_Asked_Questions_7_7_23_5b58b1a47b.docx)

- [View All FAQs Online](https://infonet.icjia.dev/faqs)  »

### Requests

**Custom data report:**

- Please send request to cja.infonethelp@illinois.gov and include the following information:

    - Time period(s)
    - Summary (aggregate) or record level

        - If record level, define what you want to see as one record, or row of information. For example, a client, client case, or service?
    
    - Any desired filters, e.g. age, client’s resident county, service type

**Technical assistance:**

- cja.infonethelp@illinois.gov (preferred) or call 312-793-8550.
